title: Supermarket Sweep

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"put it in the basket" on the other
sections.middleText2:
shopping list
shopping basket
items on the list

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1.  Read the shopping list (up to five items) aloud to the switch user.
2.  Hold up each item, e.g. play food, and ask, "Was this on our list?"
3.  If the switch user presses "next", show the next item.
4.  If they press "put it in the basket!", place the item in the basket.
5.  At the end, check the basket against the list. The switch user earns a point for each correct item.

tooltipText: Create a shopping list and use 2 switches to scan through play food items and get as many items off the list as you can remember!
